## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? -->

## The idea

<!-- What would you like Ratchet to do? -->

## Does it touch verification?

Ratchet's core promise is that nothing is "learned" without proof, and that
learning never backslides. If your idea changes how skills are proven, promoted,
or stored, say so here — those paths are held to a higher bar (see
[`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) invariants and the
[proof gate](../../docs/architecture/proof-gate.md)).

- [ ] This touches distillation / proof / promotion / the schema
- [ ] This is purely additive (CLI ergonomics, docs, integrations, etc.)
